line_text: He makes a difference Between himself and his neighbor. No blame.
comment_excerpt: This characterizes the position of a man placed among rich and powerful neighbors. It is a dangerous position. He must look neither to the right nor to the left, and must shun envy and the temptation to vie with others. In this way he remains free of mistakes.

line_text: He finds no head for holding together. Misfortune.
comment_excerpt: The head is the beginning. If the beginning is not right, there is no hope of a right ending. If we have missed the right moment for union and go on hesitating to give complete and full devotion, we shall regret the error when it is too late.
